chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 03 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 2) For orders on CMA No. 30/2025. 3) For hearing of main case. 4) For orders on CMA.
